mapper.sql: SELECT summary_id, city, indicator_code, actual_weight, max_raw, min_raw, max_norm, min_norm, create_time FROM jw_grid_summary
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO jw_grid_summary ( city, indicator_code, actual_weight, max_raw, min_raw, max_norm, min_norm, create_time ) VALUES ( #{city}, #{indicatorCode}, #{actualWeight}, #{maxRaw}, #{minRaw}, #{maxNorm}, #{minNorm}, now() )

INSERT INTO jw_grid_summary ( city, indicator_code, actual_weight, max_raw, min_raw, max_norm, min_norm, create_time ) VALUES ( #{city}, #{indicatorCode}, #{actualWeight}, #{maxRaw}, #{minRaw}, #{maxNorm}, #{minNorm}, now() )
mapper.delete:
DELETE FROM jw_grid_summary WHERE summary_id IN
#{id}
mapper.insert:
INSERT INTO jw_grid_summary ( city, indicator_code, actual_weight, max_raw, min_raw, max_norm, min_norm, create_time ) VALUES
(#{item.city}, #{item.indicatorCode}, #{item.actualWeight}, #{item.maxRaw}, #{item.minRaw}, #{item.maxNorm}, #{item.minNorm}, now())
mapper.update: UPDATE jw_grid_summary SET indicator_code = #{newCode} WHERE indicator_code = #{oldCode}
